name: Journey Medical Corp
business: Journey Medical Corp is a commercial-stage pharmaceutical company that primarily focuses on selling and marketing FDA-approved prescription pharmaceutical products for the treatment of dermatological conditions. Its current product portfolio includes eight FDA-approved prescription drugs for dermatological conditions marketed in the U.S. The company sells its products to specialty pharmacies, wholesalers, distributors, and managed care organizations.

exposures.sentence: We are a commercial-stage pharmaceutical company that primarily focuses on the selling and marketing of U.S. Food and Drug Administration ( FDA ) approved prescription pharmaceutical products for the treatment of dermatological conditions.

Luxamend is a water-based wound cream formulated for the dressing and management of superficial wounds; minor abrasions; dermal ulcers; donor sites; 1st and 2nd degree burns, including sunburns; and radiation dermatitis.

catalysts.event: FDA approval of Emrosi for rosacea
catalysts.sentence: On November 1, 2024, the FDA approved Emrosi for the treatment of inflammatory lesions of rosacea in adults.
We began sales promotion of Emrosi beginning in April 2025, and we are commercializing Emrosi in the U.S. with our existing commercial team.

Effective after the close of U.S. equity markets on June 27, 2025, we joined the small cap Russell 2000 Index and the broad-market Russell 3000 Index as a result of the 2025 annual Russell Index reconstitution.
We plan on launching our Anti-itch Product through our field sales force during the first half of 2026.
On September 25, 2025, we entered into a Third Amendment to our Credit Agreement with SWK (the Third Amendment).

tamClaims.claim: The oral rosacea market had more than 1.5 million prescriptions in 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: The oral rosacea market had more than 1.5 million prescriptions in 2025 according to Symphony Health.

tamClaims.claim: The topical rosacea market had more than 4.7 million prescriptions in 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: The topical rosacea market had more than 4.7 million prescriptions in 2025 according to Symphony Health.

tamClaims.claim: The PAH market had approximately 560,000 prescriptions in 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: The PAH market had approximately 560,000 prescriptions in 2025 according to Symphony Health, excluding over-the-counter ( OTC ) clinical strength anti-perspirants.

tamClaims.claim: The oral isotretinoin market had just over 2.3 million prescriptions in 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: The oral isotretinoin market had just over 2.3 million prescriptions in 2025 according to Symphony Health.

tamClaims.claim: The oral doxycycline market had more than 28.5 million prescriptions in 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: The oral doxycycline market had more than 28.5 million prescriptions in 2025 according to Symphony Health.

tamClaims.claim: The topical acne market had more than 24.8 million prescriptions in 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: The topical acne market had more than 24.8 million prescriptions in 2025 according to Symphony Health.

tamClaims.claim: The topical antifungal market had more than 13.2 million prescriptions in 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: The topical antifungal market had more than 13.2 million prescriptions in 2025 according to Symphony Health.

tamClaims.claim: The current U.S. market size for treatment of acne is estimated at approximately $3 billion annually.
tamClaims.sentence: The current U.S. market size for treatment of acne is considerable and estimated at approximately $3 billion annually, according to the American Medical Association.

tamClaims.claim: Rosacea affects well over 16 million Americans and as many as 415 million people worldwide.
tamClaims.sentence: According to The National Rosacea Society, it is estimated that rosacea affects well over 16 million Americans and as many as 415 million people worldwide.
